heading: Performance Metrics Available to Prometheus
body:
The following metrics are available when you use the Prometheus
integration with your Atlas cluster:

- [MongoDB Metric Labels](prometheus-metric-labels)

  - [serverStatus](manual/reference/command/serverStatus) metrics

  - [replSetGetStatus](manual/reference/command/replSetGetStatus)
    metrics

- [MongoDB Information Metrics](prometheus-mongodb-info-metrics)

- [Hardware Metrics](prometheus-hardware-metrics)
